scenario_description: Year 2025, satellite city north of the Seoul metropolitan area, City ○○. River with two bridges and dense high-rise apartment complexes. 2100 hours, overcast with light rain, visibility 200m. Engagement ongoing for 72 hours. Large civilian presence remains. BLUE: mechanized infantry battalion (K21, partial K2, K9 artillery, small UAVs, engineers, SOF attachment), ammunition 75%, fuel 24 hours. RED: regular and special operations mix, heavy IED, sniper, and anti-tank concentration.
